## Week in Review: 2026-07-13 to 2026-07-19

**One Nation** led search interest this week with an average score of 11.7.
The strongest combined search-and-sentiment score belonged to **One Nation**.

### Party Breakdown

- **Labor**: Avg interest 2.1 (+7.1% WoW), sentiment: neutral (-0.04)
- **Liberal**: Avg interest 2.0 (+7.7% WoW), sentiment: positive (+0.12)
- **Greens**: Avg interest 1.0 (0.0% WoW), sentiment: positive (+0.18)
- **One Nation**: Avg interest 11.7 (+18.8% WoW), sentiment: positive (+0.19)
